added.description: Initialized runtime_ci_tooling scaffolding for the repository, including CI, issue triage, and release workflows
Added autodoc configuration and prompt generators for automated documentation generation
Added Gemini CLI commands and settings for repository management

changed.description: Aligned runtime CI runner overrides in the config to drive runner and token behavior from configuration
Applied dart format to library files with line-length 120

fixed.description: Unblocked queued x64 jobs on hosted runners by routing ubuntu-x64 and windows-x64 matrix entries to GitHub-hosted runner labels
Addressed high-priority workflow review findings, corrected token fallback expressions, and guarded Gemini CLI installation

security.description: Added explicit least-privilege permissions to CI workflows to improve security
